title: Automation to Send an Outlook Email upon change of Status
excerpt: We have set up a form that will be embedded on a webpage where non-Monday.com users can submit a request.  Collecting basic information about their request, request date, the requestor’s email, and an option to upload a …

posts.author: czmilw (Chris Z)
posts.cookedHtml: We have set up a form that will be embedded on a webpage where non-Monday.com users can submit a request. Collecting basic information about their request, request date, the requestor’s email, and an option to upload a file. How can we automate the process of sending the person an email when there is a change of Status? Are add-ins needed?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @czmilw! You should be able to utilise the Outlook integration to achieve this - specifically this recipe below:

You can set up an email column and input the non-monday.com users addresses so that for each item when that status changes, the relevant person is contacted.

Let me know what you think!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Sorry to hear this @queen

Can you please try reconnecting your Outlook account by following the steps below?

  1. Edit the connection via the recipes setting:

inline-8670120311582×316 49.3 KB

  1. Then, even if you want to use the same account, click on the “Use another account” option and follow the steps to connect the same account:

inline-1553166718736×560 28 KB

Let me know if this helps!!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hmm this doesn’t sound right then Would you be happy to reach out to support@monday.com and share this information? If it is automatically connecting to the wrong account despite having selected a different account then this doesn’t sound expected. You’re welcome to share this community thread with any screenshots or screen-recordings to help demonstrate the issue - the more context the better so our technical team can investigate
